hero.title: Green Energy Solutions for Industrial Future
hero.subtitle: We provide integrated HVAC technology, energy management systems, and solar panel solutions to enhance your company's operational efficiency.

about.title: Elevating Energy Efficiency to the Highest Level
about.subtitle: PT. Benua Green Energy is committed to helping Indonesian industries achieve Net Zero Emission targets through innovative cooling and energy management technology.
about.history: Founded with a vision to modernize industrial energy infrastructure, we combine engineering expertise with the latest technology to reduce operational costs while preserving the environment.
about.vision: To be the primary strategic partner for industries in the green energy transition across Southeast Asia.
about.mission: Providing efficient, reliable, and affordable HVAC and EMS solutions for large-scale industrial needs.

services.title: Our Premium Services
services.hvac_d: High-efficiency industrial cooling systems for factories and commercial buildings.
services.ems_d: Energy audits and real-time monitoring systems to optimize operational costs.
services.solar_d: Industrial solar panel implementation for energy independence and carbon emission reduction.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions regarding BGE solutions.
faq.q1: How long is the return on investment (ROI) for solar panels?
faq.a1: The average ROI for industrial scale is 3-5 years depending on energy consumption and government subsidies.
faq.q2: Does BGE provide routine maintenance services?
faq.a2: Yes, we provide preventive maintenance contracts to ensure HVAC and EMS system efficiency remains optimal.
faq.q3: How do I start an energy audit?
faq.a3: Simply contact us via the contact form, and our expert team will schedule an initial site survey.

footer.description: Leader in green energy solutions and industrial efficiency in Indonesia. Helping companies transform towards sustainable operations.
